verses.4: Aw zid AAalayhi warattili alqurana tarteelan
verses.6: Inna nashiata allayli hiya ashaddu watan waaqwamu qeelan
verses.7: Inna laka fee alnnahari sabhan taweelan
verses.8: Waothkuri isma rabbika watabattal ilayhi tabteelan
verses.9: Rabbu almashriqi waalmaghribi la ilaha illa huwa faittakhithhu wakeelan
verses.10: Waisbir AAala ma yaqooloona waohjurhum hajran jameelan
verses.11: Watharnee waalmukaththibeena olee alnnaAAmati wamahhilhum qaleelan
verses.14: Yawma tarjufu alardu waaljibalu wakanati aljibalu katheeban maheelan
verses.15: Inna arsalna ilaykum rasoolan shahidan AAalaykum kama arsalna ila firAAawna rasoolan
verses.16: FaAAasa firAAawnu alrrasoola faakhathnahu akhthan wabeelan
verses.17: Fakayfa tattaqoona in kafartum yawman yajAAalu alwildana sheeban
verses.18: Alssamao munfatirun bihi kana waAAduhu mafAAoolan
verses.19: Inna hathihi tathkiratun faman shaa ittakhatha ila rabbihi sabeelan
verses.20: Inna rabbaka yaAAlamu annaka taqoomu adna min thuluthayi allayli wanisfahu wathuluthahu wataifatun mina allatheena maAAaka waAllahu yuqaddiru allayla waalnnahara AAalima an lan tuhsoohu fataba AAalaykum faiqraoo ma tayassara mina alqurani AAalima an sayakoonu minkum marda waakharoona yadriboona fee alardi yabtaghoona min fadli Allahi waakharoona yuqatiloona fee sabeeli Allahi faiqraoo ma tayassara minhu waaqeemoo alssalata waatoo alzzakata waaqridoo Allaha qardan hasanan wama tuqaddimoo lianfusikum min khayrin tajidoohu AAinda Allahi huwa khayran waaAAthama ajran waistaghfiroo Allaha inna Allaha ghafoorun raheemun
